context: Agent was asked to create a wave document for a research consolidation with tasks of clearly different complexity. Evaluate whether the Model column is present and whether tier assignments are appropriate. Tier names in the wave document are provider-agnostic: 'fast', 'standard', 'smart'.

checklist.name: model-column-present-in-all-wave-tables
checklist.description: Every wave table in the document includes a Model column

checklist.name: triage-phases-assigned-standard
checklist.description: All 6 triage phases (skill-driven, template output) are assigned 'standard' in the Model column

checklist.name: synthesis-phase-assigned-smart
checklist.description: The synthesis phase (cross-document analysis, high judgment) is assigned 'smart' in the Model column

checklist.name: consolidation-phase-assigned-fast
checklist.description: The consolidation pass (PUNCHLIST flip, script run) is assigned 'fast' in the Model column

checklist.name: cleanup-phase-assigned-fast
checklist.description: The cleanup audit phase (lint, consistency check) is assigned 'fast' in the Model column

checklist.name: document-written-to-correct-path
checklist.description: The wave document is written to .context/plans/research-consolidation.md
